subject: Vegeta (Dragon Ball Super) in Super Saiyan form — anime IP character, aggressive combat stance
description: A compact male warrior with upright spiky golden hair lunges forward in an aggressive combat posture. His body crackles with a bright golden-yellow ki aura. The figure wears a dark bodysuit with armor elements. His face is contorted in a fierce scowl — brow furrowed, teeth bared, projecting a combative pride. The background is a gradient of greens and yellows with energy lines, creating a sense of rapid forward motion.
foreground: Male warrior in dark bodysuit and armor, Super Saiyan golden spiky hair, lunging forward with fierce expression
background: Green-yellow gradient with streaking energy lines suggesting motion
